notes: Memory-only Lite Demo package with one public skill.
v0.2.7 requires one current schema plus one verified current checkpoint before an old memory root is considered taken over.
After upgrading, an old conversation needs only one activation command; a prematurely written schema, no log, or an old checkpoint cannot skip takeover.
Correct v0.2.6 roots receive one v0.2.7 route upgrade while their complete prior session-log bytes remain an immutable prefix.
Current owners and live mandatory guards stay top-level; precise version or event terms open one cold history route only when needed.
Touched scopes still load every matching current owner and mandatory guard without a top-k or total memory cap.
Package checks, archives, and transactional installs now exclude Python bytecode caches.
Installation does not scan all projects; takeover happens only when the user activates Lite Demo in the current old project, and later activations are idempotent.
v0.2.4 task-routing wording and one-skill ordinary-user behavior remain unchanged.
v0.1.7 remains available as the retained stable fallback.
